raw_consumer_statement:
Dear CFPB Team, I am writing to formally lodge a complaint against Barclays Bank in connection with a recent dispute I filed on my JetBlue credit card concerning a purchase made from XXXX. Despite providing ample information that the products I received were defective, misrepresented, and not as described, my dispute was denied, and I was instructed to contact the merchant directly, which has proven ineffective. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Both the console and the dresser arrived in damaged boxes, and the materials were of poor quality, with the particle board breaking during assembly. 
2. False Advertising : The products were falsely advertised as being easy to assemble, which was not the case. The assembly process was overly complex and time-consuming, spanning more than 20 pages in the manual. 
3. Misrepresentation : The items looked nothing like the pictures on XXXXXXXX XXXX  website, and the quality was far below what was advertised. 
Barclays Response : After filing my dispute, Barclays denied my claim, stating that I needed to contact XXXX directly to resolve the issue. However, XXXX has been unresponsive to my attempts to seek a refund, leaving me without recourse. Barclays did not provide me with any opportunity to explain the situation further or to provide additional evidence to support my dispute.
